name: Mentari Intercultural School Bintaro

campuses.name: Main Campus
campuses.address: Jl. Perigi Baru No.7A, Pondok Aren, Bintaro, Tangerang Selatan 15228, Indonesia

intelligence.verdict: Parents say Mentari Bintaro is a sensible choice for families in the Bintaro and South Tangerang area who want Cambridge and IB options.
paragraphs: Parents say Mentari Bintaro is a sensible choice for families in the Bintaro and South Tangerang area who want Cambridge and IB options.

fees.note: Approximate annual fee range: US$4.4K – US$8K. Contact the school for the full fee schedule and payment options.

paragraphs: Diverse international and local student body. Contact the school for current enrolment details.
Facilities include: Bintaro campus, Science laboratories, Libraries, Swimming pool, Sports facilities.

metaDescription: Mentari Intercultural School Bintaro (Greater Jakarta). Parents say Mentari Bintaro is a sensible choice for families in the Bintaro and South Tangerang area who want Cambridge and IB options.…
